subject: Warranty length for Wireless Buds Pro
body: Hi, I bought Wireless Buds Pro last month. How long is the warranty and what does it cover?

subject: Where is my order ORD-1002?
body: I placed order ORD-1002 a week ago. Can you tell me the shipping status?

subject: Refund for defective headset
body: Order ORD-1005 arrived but the left earcup has no audio. I want a full refund of $44.99 please.

subject: Return policy question
body: What is your return window if I change my mind after opening the box?

subject: Order ORD-9999 never arrived
body: My order ORD-9999 shows nothing in tracking. Please help.

subject: Cancel order ORD-1003
body: Please cancel order ORD-1003 before it ships. I ordered by mistake.

subject: International shipping
body: Do you ship to Canada and how long does delivery usually take?

subject: Account hacked — urgent
body: Someone changed my email and placed orders I did not authorize. I need immediate help locking my account.

subject: Store credit for late delivery
body: Order ORD-1002 is very late. I'd like a $15 store credit for the inconvenience.

subject: Pairing instructions
body: How do I pair Wireless Buds Pro with a Windows laptop?

subject: Subscription billing
body: I was charged twice for Cloud Backup Plus this month. Please fix billing.

subject: Status of ORD-1001
body: Can you confirm delivery for order ORD-1001?

subject: Ambiguous product complaint
body: The thing I bought sounds weird and I hate it. Fix it.

subject: Partial refund request
body: One of two Headset Lite units in ORD-1002 is broken. I want a partial refund of $22.49.
